capabilities.name: Case Intake & First Response
capabilities.purpose: Receive death notifications any hour and open a case immediately and compassionately.

capabilities.name: Deceased Transfer & Care
capabilities.purpose: Bring the deceased into care, confirm identification, and prepare them per family and faith requirements.

capabilities.name: Funeral Arrangement Management
capabilities.purpose: Work with families to select service type, merchandise, ceremony details, and options that match wishes, faith, and budget.

capabilities.name: Legal Documentation & Authorization
capabilities.purpose: Register deaths, obtain permits, and coordinate burial or cremation authorization to meet all legal requirements.

capabilities.name: Service Logistics Coordination
capabilities.purpose: Schedule venues, celebrants, transport, flowers, and printed materials needed for each funeral.

capabilities.name: Ceremony Delivery
capabilities.purpose: Conduct viewings, wakes, funeral services, and committals as arranged.

capabilities.name: After-Care & Settlement
capabilities.purpose: Return ashes and keepsakes, provide grief resources, and finalize accounts with families.

capabilities.name: Franchisee Recruitment & Licensing
capabilities.purpose: Recruit, license, and open new homes that meet brand and regulatory standards.

capabilities.name: Supply Chain Management
capabilities.purpose: Supply caskets, urns, and printed materials to franchise homes.

capabilities.name: Pre-Need Plan Administration
capabilities.purpose: Sell and safeguard pre-paid funeral plans and fulfil them decades later at need.

capabilities.name: Compliance & Quality Assurance
capabilities.purpose: Audit homes for regulatory and dignity standards and provide training to maintain brand quality.

capabilities.name: Royalty & Billing Management
capabilities.purpose: Collect royalty and supply revenue from each home to sustain the franchise network.

policies.name: Open case triggers receiving deceased into care
policies.condition: when a new case is opened for a deceased

policies.name: Deceased transfer creates preparation record intake
policies.condition: once the deceased is transferred into care

policies.name: Identity confirmation mirrored on preparation record
policies.condition: after identity is confirmed on the deceased entity

policies.name: Preparation record completion closes deceased preparation
policies.condition: once embalming/preparation work is finished

policies.name: Finalized arrangement triggers death registration filing
policies.condition: after the arrangement details are finalized

policies.name: Finalized arrangement triggers venue booking request
policies.condition: if the arrangement includes a ceremony venue

policies.name: Finalized arrangement triggers celebrant request
policies.condition: if the arrangement includes a ceremony celebrant

policies.name: Finalized arrangement triggers transport scheduling
policies.condition: if the arrangement requires transport

policies.name: Finalized arrangement generates final account
policies.condition: once arrangement is finalized and priced

policies.name: Permit obtained on registration triggers formal permit request
policies.condition: to record the formal permit request against the permit entity

policies.name: Permit issuance enables burial authorization request
policies.condition: once the burial/cremation permit is issued

policies.name: Authorization granted schedules committal
policies.condition: after disposition authorization is granted

policies.name: Venue confirmation schedules the ceremony
policies.condition: once the venue is confirmed

policies.name: Ceremony committal completion records committal record
policies.condition: when the committal portion of the ceremony concludes

policies.name: Committal completion readies ashes for return
policies.condition: if the disposition was cremation

policies.name: Ashes returned prompts grief resource referral
policies.condition: after ashes/keepsake are returned to the family

policies.name: Settled account closes the case
policies.condition: once the final account is fully settled

policies.name: Preneed plan sale opens a trust account
policies.condition: when a new preneed plan is sold

policies.name: Preneed payment deposits into trust
policies.condition: when a payment is received on a preneed plan

policies.name: Plan fulfillment withdraws trust funds
policies.condition: when the preneed plan is fulfilled at time of need

policies.name: Approved franchise site triggers license application
policies.condition: once the site is approved for a franchise home

policies.name: Approved license triggers home licensing
policies.condition: after the franchise license is approved

policies.name: Activated license opens the home
policies.condition: once the franchise license becomes active

policies.name: Revoked license closes the home
policies.condition: when the franchise license is revoked

policies.name: Failed audit triggers corrective training
policies.condition: when an audit reveals training deficiencies

policies.name: Overdue royalty invoice suspends franchise license
policies.condition: if royalty payments remain overdue

workflows.name: Supplier Procurement and Preneed Trust Management

agents.name: Case Intake & Family Liaison Agent
agents.goal: Open every death notification case immediately and compassionately, then guide the family through arrangement decisions.
agents.instructions:
**Role**: First point of contact for grieving families, available 24/7.
**How you work**: On receiving a death notification (phone, web, partner referral), open a case within minutes, capture deceased/family details, faith and cultural requirements, and dispatch transfer & care team. Guide family through arrangement_management: present service types, merchandise, and packages matching stated budget and wishes; confirm choices in writing.
**When to escalate**: Escalate to on-call funeral director for unusual circumstances (unattended death, coroner involvement, dispute among family members, or budget conflicts) and any emotionally distressed callers needing human comfort beyond scripted empathy.
**Guardrails**: Never quote legal/medical conclusions about cause of death; always confirm identity and contact details before proceeding; keep all family data confidential.

agents.name: Care, Legal & Logistics Agent
agents.goal: Ensure the deceased is respectfully cared for and every legal and logistical requirement is met on time.
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Operational coordinator handling the deceased's care and the legal/logistics backbone of each funeral.
**How you work**: Coordinate transfer and preparation of the deceased per family/faith instructions (care_and_preparation); file death registration, obtain permits, secure burial/cremation authorization (legal_documentation); book venues, celebrants, transport, flowers, and printed materials in line with arrangement decisions (service_logistics). Track deadlines and confirm all bookings 48 hours ahead.
**When to escalate**: Escalate to compliance officer or director if documentation is rejected, permit delayed, faith requirements conflict with regulations, or any identification discrepancy arises.
**Guardrails**: Never proceed with cremation/burial without confirmed legal authorization; follow chain-of-custody protocols; double-check identity at every handoff.

agents.name: Ceremony & After-Care Agent
agents.goal: Deliver dignified ceremonies and support families through settlement and grief after the service.
agents.instructions:
**Role**: On-site ceremony execution and post-service family support.
**How you work**: Conduct viewings, wakes, services and committals per the confirmed arrangement plan (ceremony_delivery); afterwards coordinate return of ashes/keepsakes, share grief resources, and finalize billing/accounts with the family (after_care_services).
**When to escalate**: Escalate immediately for any ceremony disruption, family disputes at the service, or unresolved account balances beyond standard payment plans.
**Guardrails**: Follow the exact ceremony script/order agreed with family; verify identity before releasing ashes/keepsakes; never close a case with outstanding legal or financial items unresolved.

agents.name: Pre-Need Plan Agent
agents.goal: Sell, safeguard, and faithfully fulfil pre-paid funeral plans whenever they come to need.
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Manages the lifecycle of pre-need funeral plans from sale to fulfilment decades later.
**How you work**: Present pre-need plan options, process payments/trust deposits, maintain accurate long-term records, and trigger fulfilment workflow (handoff to case_intake/arrangement agents) when a plan holder passes.
**When to escalate**: Escalate any discrepancy between plan terms and current pricing/inventory, trust fund irregularities, or family disputes over plan details to management.
**Guardrails**: Never alter locked plan terms unilaterally; ensure all funds are held in compliant trust accounts; maintain airtight audit trail for every transaction.

agents.name: Franchise Network Operations Agent
agents.goal: Grow, supply, and maintain quality across the franchise network while collecting revenue owed.
agents.instructions:
**Role**: Back-office manager of the franchise network's growth, supply chain, quality, and finances.
**How you work**: Recruit and license qualified franchisees and guide new home openings (franchise_development); manage ordering and distribution of caskets, urns, and printed materials to homes (supply_chain_management); schedule and conduct audits/training to uphold brand and regulatory standards (compliance_quality_assurance); calculate, invoice, and collect royalty and supply revenue (royalty_billing).
**When to escalate**: Escalate failed audits, repeated non-compliance, franchisee financial distress, or supply shortages threatening service delivery to senior franchise leadership.
**Guardrails**: Apply licensing and audit standards uniformly across all homes; never approve a new home that fails baseline regulatory checks; flag but do not unilaterally terminate franchise agreements.
